description: A static HTML/CSS webpage showcasing Wuhan's culinary culture with 5+ featured snacks

steps: Copy all files from workspace/frontend/ to your web server root directory
Ensure the server is configured to serve index.html as the default document
Verify all image assets are in the correct relative paths
Test the page in multiple browsers and devices

backend_setup: Create virtual environment: python -m venv venv
Activate venv: source venv/bin/activate (Linux/Mac) or venv\Scripts\activate (Windows)
Set environment variables: copy .env.example to .env and configure database connection
Run database migrations: alembic upgrade head
frontend_setup: Build for production: npm run build

html_validation: All images have alt attributes for accessibility
Valid HTML structure with no syntax errors
css_validation: Responsive design works on mobile, tablet, and desktop
content_validation: At least 5 Wuhan snacks showcased with descriptions
All snack information is accurate and culturally appropriate
Images are properly optimized and load efficiently
Page loads within 3 seconds on average connection
accessibility: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance for color contrast
Focus indicators visible for interactive elements

maintenance.content_updates: Edit HTML files in workspace/frontend/ to update snack information
maintenance.styling_updates: Modify CSS files in workspace/frontend/styles/ to change appearance
maintenance.image_updates: Replace images in workspace/frontend/public/images/ with optimized versions
maintenance.performance_monitoring: Use Lighthouse or WebPageTest for regular performance audits

common_issues.images_not_loading: Check file paths and ensure images are in correct directory
common_issues.layout_breaks_on_mobile: Verify viewport meta tag and media queries
common_issues.slow_page_load: Optimize image sizes and enable compression
common_issues.api_connection_errors: Verify backend is running and CORS is properly configured
